falsification_conditions.condition: The S&P 500 closes above 5000 with a volume surge exceeding 200% of the 20-day average
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A clear breakout with extreme volume would invalidate the 'hold' signal by confirming a bullish trend contrary to the current unknown verdict.

falsification_conditions.condition: The 14-day moving average of the CBOE VIX crosses above 30
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A spike in volatility would falsify the current hold by indicating market panic or extreme uncertainty, contradicting the pattern's implied stability.

falsification_conditions.condition: The price of Bitcoin rises 15% above the 200-day moving average within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A sharp crypto rally would invalidate the verdict by showing asset class-specific momentum that undermines the pattern's predictive validity.

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
